name: feeder
title: Feeder
description: Provide integration with Feeder RSS reader
author: vladar107

preferences.name: sessionCookie
preferences.title: Feeder Session Cookie
preferences.description: Value of the _feeder.co_session cookie. Log in at feeder.co, then copy it from DevTools → Application → Cookies → https://feeder.co

commands.name: show-unread
commands.title: Show Unread Feeds
commands.description: Show all unread posts from your feed

commands.name: show-all
commands.title: Show All Feeds
commands.description: Show all posts from your feed

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
